_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

author: doro
content: BATCH-08c production WAL 启用完成。在 database::init_database Connection::open 后插入 pragma_update_and_check(None, "journal_mode", "WAL")，配合既有 synchronous=NORMAL + wal_autocheckpoint=1000 形成 SQLite 推荐组合。新增 2 个单测验证 fresh init + 跨连接持久化（db-level）。lib.rs 注释更新指向 BATCH-08c。core-storage --lib 89 → 91 PASS。bridge --lib 16/16 + tests 8/8 维持。新增 finding F-W1A-056（backup_dao sidecar）已录入 master report 留独立批次。
